title: selago meyeri
intro: Selago meyeri, also known as Cape honeysuckle or honeysuckle flower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern Cape region of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selago meyeri include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Herbal preparations of Selago meyeri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including colds and flu.
